title: Kaji's Car
wikitext:
{{Imagebox
|align  = right
|images = [[Image:Lotus elan 1600 s1 manga.jpg|thumb|none|A snippet of the manga showing Kaji's Lotus, note the rear lamps, bumper, trunk lines, and door hinge lines]]
[[Image:Lotus elan 1600 s1.jpg|thumb|none|A picture of a Lotus Elan 1600 S1 showing the rear lamps, bumper, trunk lines, and door hinge lines]]}}
'''Kaji's Car''', as it appears in [[Yoshiyuki Sadamoto|Sadamoto]]'s [[Neon Genesis Evangelion (manga)|Manga]] and the [[Girlfriend of Steel 2]] game, is a Lotus Elan 1600 S1 convertible. [[Kaji]] is depicted with his car in manga chapter 33, pages 11-13. The similarities between the real Elan S1 and the one that appears in the manga include the general shape of the body, the non-fixed headlamps, the trunk lines and door hinge lines, the rear bumper. The nail in the coffin is the fact that Sadamoto drew the car to have a ''Elan 1600'' badge on the right side of the car and a ''Lotus Elan'' badge on the left rear.

The 1600 (also referred to as ''Series 1'') is a Type 26 Lotus that was sold between 1962 and 1966. It sports a 1558cc water-cooled inline 4 engine producing around 105bhp. The car shares many visual similarities with the Series 2 and later Elans of the same type. Many Type 26 Elans also have a 3rd set of tail light assembly but the ones on either side of the rear plate are only reflectors. Originally, all Elan S1's were open 2 seater convertibles, but in 1964, a fixed head coupe was made that had slightly different body. Later versions of the 1600 squeezed an extra 2 seats into the back.

*[http://www.lotuselan.net/publish/article_341.shtml Lotus Elan article from LotusElan.net]
*[http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Lotus_Elan Lotus Elan article at Wikipedia]
